title: Burger Date
description: A full burger date, your pick of the place. Redeemable anytime.

title: Movie Night
description: You choose the movie. I'll bring the snacks and the face masks. No complaints.

title: Coffee Date
description: Any coffee shop of your choice. Just the two of us with coffee and a good dessert.

title: Trip Date
description: A surprise trip to somewhere you've always wanted to go however ask me one month before. Redeemable anytime.

title: Recreate a Memory
description: We pick our favorite photo and recreate it. Your choice.
